DEV ONLY

One of every Phase 0 primitive. Use this surface to verify visual changes after editing --ds-* tokens or the ds* factories. Toggle light/dark mode to confirm both themes render correctly. URL param ?ds=1 is the only way in.

Quote + Underwriting
Live carrier rates pulled directly from the Insurance Toolkits API — every carrier ITK returns, sorted by monthly premium.
0 / 250 used · 30-day rolling
Quote inputs
IUL quotes are premium-range estimates. Always run a full carrier illustration before binding — these numbers won't include indexed crediting, riders, or projected cash value.
The copilot estimates approval likelihood and best carrier locally — health is not sent to the carrier rate API. Underwriting data covers Americo, Aetna, American-Amicable, Transamerica, and Corebridge.
Fill age, sex, state, and face amount.

Americo UFirst Rewards® — Dec 1, 2025 – May 29, 2026
Qualification period: Dec 1, 2025 – May 29, 2026. Applications must be paid by May 29, 2026. Final measurement: June 15, 2026. Payout by June 30, 2026.

American-Amicable — Bonus Bucks Monthly Recognition
Earn monthly Bonus Bucks by hitting paid annualized life premium thresholds. Awards are not cumulative. Must be active and in good standing. Must meet placement and persistency requirements.

My Pickup Phone

Edit number
Telnyx rings this number first when you place a call from the dashboard, then bridges you to the lead. Both sides see your primary number as the caller-ID.

Billing Rates
Per Phone Number
$3.00
per number / month
Per Minute
$0.02
per call minute (rounded up)
Estimated this month —
Billing Config (admin only)
e.g. 300 = $3.00/number/month
e.g. 2 = $0.02/min
Recurring $3/unit price from Stripe Dashboard
Metered $0.02/unit price from Stripe Dashboard
Setup: In Stripe Dashboard create two products:
1. Phone Number → Recurring, $3.00/unit/month (not metered) → copy Price ID above.
2. Call Minutes → Recurring, $0.02/unit/month, metered (aggregate: sum) → copy Price ID above.
Changes take effect on the next purchase/call. Existing Stripe items are not retroactively updated.

Terms of Service  ·  Privacy Policy
Toggle the carriers you are contracted with. Each row shows all product lines that carrier offers — one toggle covers all of them. Selecting only some carriers filters the Quote + Underwriting tab to those carriers; leaving them all off shows every carrier ITK returns.
Your licensed carriers
Carrier Product Lines Licensed
Connect external services to your dashboard. Each integration is one click — no API keys to paste.
Google Calendar & Gmail
Syncs your Google Calendar appointments into the Calendar tab and grants Gmail-send access for outreach features.
Connected. Events sync automatically.
Lead Vendor Webhooks
Each vendor gets a unique webhook URL. Paste it into the vendor's portal — leads post automatically with the vendor's name as the source.

Loading plans…
Billed monthly via Stripe. Existing subscribers switch instantly; new subscribers are taken to a secure Stripe checkout page.
Before you go…
Please explain why you want to cancel. Select all that apply.
Are you sure you want to cancel this plan?
Here's what will happen:
  • All your phone numbers will be permanently deleted immediately
  • Dashboard access continues until the end of your current billing period
  • After that, your account will be downgraded and access removed
Your subscription will not auto-renew. You will not be charged again after your current period ends.

—

Search US Local numbers by area code. The selected number will replace — at no extra charge.

Add Lead
Custom Fields (optional)
Add any extra info — marital status, income, hobbies, or anything else specific to this lead.
Import Leads
Upload a CSV or Excel file (.xlsx). Column headers are auto-detected — we match Name, Phone, DOB, State, Military Status, and other common fields automatically.
Step 1: Upload File
Step 2: Map Columns
Step 3: Confirm & Import
Click or drag & drop your CSV or Excel file
Supports .csv and .xlsx — exported from Google Sheets, Excel, PhoneBurner, Mojo, or any lead vendor
.csv .xlsx
All leads from this import will be tagged with this source. Previously used sources appear as suggestions.
file.csv
0 rows found
Review each column from your file and confirm what field it maps to. We've auto-detected as many as we can. Columns marked "Skip" will not be imported.
Ready to import
Review the mapping summary below then click Import.

0 / 250 used · 30-day rolling
Quote inputs
IUL quotes are premium-range estimates. Always run a full carrier illustration before binding — these numbers won't include indexed crediting, riders, or projected cash value.
Parsing health conditions…
Health drives the local approval-class estimate only — it is not sent to the carrier rate API. Approval badges cover Americo, Aetna, American-Amicable, Transamerica, and Corebridge.
Fill age, sex, state, and face amount.
Lead Vendor Integrations
Each vendor gets a unique webhook URL. When you purchase a lead, it posts automatically to your dashboard — no CSV needed.
Loading integrations…
How to use your webhook URL
  1. Copy your vendor's webhook URL above
  2. In your vendor's portal → find Webhook or Lead Delivery URL
  3. Paste the URL and save — new leads appear here instantly with the vendor as source
Need to add a new vendor? Go to Settings → Integrations.
